email.attach: Save the diagnostic ZIP and attach it manually to this email.
email.privacy: Cherry Studio does not automatically attach, upload, or send the ZIP or this email.
email.prompt: Please add what happened immediately before the failure and whether retry reproduces it.
email.subject: Cherry Studio migration diagnostics — {{failure}} — {{version}} — {{platformArch}}

notice.large: The file is large. Consider using your email provider's large-attachment feature or a cloud drive.
notice.logsIncluded: The diagnostic bundle contains today's raw application logs, which may include file paths, error stacks, user content, or credentials. Review it yourself before sending.
notice.logsNotIncluded: The diagnostic bundle was saved, but today's application logs could not be included. You can save it again before sending.
notice.notUploaded: The diagnostic bundle is not uploaded automatically.

save.failedMessage: The diagnostic bundle could not be saved. No data was uploaded or sent.
save.title: Save migration diagnostic bundle

email.attach: 请保存诊断 ZIP，并手动附加到此邮件。
email.privacy: Cherry Studio 不会自动附加、上传或发送诊断 ZIP 或此邮件。
email.prompt: 请补充失败前执行的操作，以及重试后是否仍会复现。
email.subject: Cherry Studio 迁移诊断 — {{failure}} — {{version}} — {{platformArch}}

notice.large: 文件较大，建议使用邮箱的大附件或网盘功能发送。
notice.logsIncluded: 诊断包包含当天的原始应用日志，可能含有文件路径、错误堆栈、用户内容或凭据。发送前请自行检查。
notice.logsNotIncluded: 诊断包已保存，但当天应用日志未能加入。您可以重新保存后再发送。

save.failedMessage: 诊断包保存失败。未上传或发送任何数据。
save.title: 保存迁移诊断包
